creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #3)

Veracrypt encrypts volumes afaik, it isn't file system transparent and thus doesn't mesh well with tools like rsync or ZFS snapshots.  rencfs might be a replacement, but I tend to trust encfs more as it has been under development with lots of use for years, even though development has ceased.

I'll undeprecate the port for now.
